remarks: Perfectly positioned just steps from downtown Darien, the train station, schools, and the vibrant new Corbin District, this beautifully updated Colonial offers the ideal blend of convenience, charm, and move-in-ready living. Freshly painted throughout with newly refinished hardwood floors, this 5-bedroom, 3.5-bath home features generous living spaces including a formal living room, dining room, family room, rec room, and an open kitchen designed for both everyday living and entertaining. Set on .70 acres, the backyard is a true surprise, featuring an expansive multi-level deck ideal for outdoor dining, entertaining, and relaxing. Beyond the property lies an additional 1.19 acres of protected open space, creating a beautiful natural backdrop and an unexpected sense of space. Timeless curb appeal, abundant living space, and an unbeatable in-town location make this a truly exceptional opportunity. Walk to downtown Darien, the train station, schools, restaurants, and the vibrant new Corbin District while enjoying all the comfort and flexibility of a move-in-ready home.
